stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are flying at 8500 ft over position N54°30' E12°30', maintaining a true track of 180° toward the München airspace boundary located at N48°30' E12°30'. Under standard ISA conditions, with a ground speed of 120 kt and a descent rate of 400 ft/min, how far in advance of the point N48°30' E12°30' must you begin your descent in order to reach the base level of the München airspace upon arrival?
